strings.Main.HotKeyError.Title: FastTools
strings.Main.HotKeyError.Body: The app will stay open so you can update the hotkey in Settings.
strings.Settings.Title: FastTools Settings
strings.Settings.Header.Title: Preferences
strings.Settings.General.Title: General
strings.Settings.General.Description: Core behavior, language, and visual style
strings.Settings.HotKeys.Title: Hotkeys
strings.Settings.HotKeys.Description: Alt+Space wakes the search bar. Click and press a new key combination to change it.
strings.Settings.CustomCommands.Title: Custom Commands
strings.Settings.CustomCommands.Description: Expose local scripts and terminal tools in search
strings.Settings.Priority.Title: Result Priority
strings.Settings.Priority.Description: Reorder how result groups are surfaced.
strings.Settings.Priority.Help: Drag a row to reorder. Groups higher up appear first in search results.
strings.Settings.Plugins.Title: Plugins
strings.Settings.Plugins.Description: Select a plugin to view its settings and toggle its enable state
strings.Settings.Name: Name
strings.Settings.InvalidHotKey: Invalid hotkey format. Use a value like Alt+Space.
